_README.purpose: Custom OpenRouter model registry for PAL MCP, referenced from .mcp.json via OPENROUTER_MODELS_CONFIG_PATH.
_README.why: PAL's bundled conf does not include z-ai/glm-5.2, so it falls back to a generic 32_768-token context window (providers/openrouter.py:_lookup_capabilities). That 32K cap, not GLM's real window, was limiting 'El Manager' heavy-reading delegation.
_README.fix: Declare z-ai/glm-5.2 with its real 1M context window so the registry hit bypasses the generic fallback. context_window verified at openrouter.ai/z-ai/glm-5.2 (1,048,576). max_output_tokens for the standard slug is 32,768 (the [1m] variant raises output to 131,072).
_README.note: OPENROUTER_MODELS_CONFIG_PATH REPLACES (not merges) the bundled conf; only GLM is needed because OPENROUTER_ALLOWED_MODELS restricts to it. Restart/reconnect the PAL MCP server for changes to load (registry is read at startup).

models.description: Z.ai GLM-5.2 via OpenRouter — 1M-token context. Secondary model for the Claude+GLM collaboration environment.
